creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mohammad S. Babaei from comment #1)
> When will boost-1.66.0 hit the ports?

Once Boost 1.66 is released[1] another exp-run maybe required. After that it'd depend on how much bustage remains and whether I have time to reduce it before 2018Q1 branches. So, probably at the start of January.

[1] See calendar - http://www.boost.org/development/index.html
